title: Ore Readout V2
description: Sends announcements to notify staff and console whenever any player breaks a certain block (e.g. ores).
body:
# Ore Readout V2

### About

OreReadoutV2 is a server-side Fabric mod to notify staff and server console whenever certain blocks (e.g. ores) are broken.
If you are familiar with OreAnnouncer and OreNotifier, 
this mod is basically the lite version of those but on Fabric.

This mod comes in handy as a server administrator 
when you want to catch potential xrayers and cheaters,
but prefer not using an anti-xray or ore obfuscator mod.

### Features

- Notify server console and in-game moderators/staff.
- Notify your team on Discord via Discord Webhooks.
- Temporarily toggle the in-game ore readouts on or off (per player setting).
- Configure *who* gets to see in-game ore readouts using permissions; e.g. LuckPerms

### How to Use

- To see how to configure this mod, check out the [GitHub Page](https://github.com/Veivel/OreReadoutV2/).
